name: TaxNexus
description: TaxNexus is a cannabis tax compliance REST API and financial technology service that automates calculation of state, county, and local cannabis excise taxes across supported jurisdictions including California and Oregon. Cannabis POS and ERP software developers can integrate with the TaxNexus API to calculate excise taxes, track and store tax data, and file monthly cannabis tax returns.

itemOffered.name: TaxNexus API
itemOffered.description: RESTful HTTPS-based API for cannabis tax compliance. Enables calculation of state, county, and local cannabis excise taxes, storage of tax data, and support for monthly cannabis tax return filing across supported jurisdictions.
